pageHeader.title: Courses
pageHeader.subtitle: Learn the Mahabharata Through Structured Study
pageHeader.description: Online courses designed to provide a comprehensive, structured understanding of the Mahabharata — from its narrative to its philosophy.

featuredCourse.title: Understanding the Mahabharata: A Comprehensive Course
featuredCourse.subtitle: An 8-week journey through the world's greatest epic
featuredCourse.description: This course offers a deep dive into the Mahabharata, covering its narrative structure, key characters, philosophical frameworks, and enduring relevance. Suitable for beginners and advanced learners alike, the course combines video lectures, readings, discussion forums, and live Q&A sessions.
learningOutcomes: Understand the narrative arc and key episodes of the Mahabharata
Analyze the philosophical concepts of dharma, karma, and moksha
Critically engage with scholarly debates on the epic
Apply ethical insights from the Mahabharata to contemporary contexts
Identify major characters and their roles in the narrative

seo.title: Mahabharata Online Courses | Varun Gupta
seo.description: Enroll in free online courses on the Mahabharata taught by Varun Gupta. Learn about the epic's narrative, philosophy, characters, and contemporary relevance.
